Work With Bobbi Rose

Teetl'it Gwich'in · Whitehorse, Yukon

Rooted in Rivers.
Led by Story.

River guide, mentor, artist, and land protector — bringing Gwich'in culture, community, and the wild north to life.

Work With Bobbi Rose Explore the Work
Scroll

About

A guide, a teacher, a keeper of story

Born and raised with deep roots in Teetl'it Zheh — Fort McPherson, NWT — and now based in Whitehorse, Yukon, Bobbi Rose carries forward the traditions of her Teetl'it Gwich'in heritage through every river she runs and every story she tells.

As the owner of Dinjii Zhuh Adventures, she leads river journeys, youth programs, and community experiences grounded in land, water, and cultural knowledge. Her work spans guiding, mentorship, fashion, beadwork, and a growing voice in Indigenous tourism and water advocacy.

When you step onto the water with Bobbi Rose, you are entering a living classroom — a space where the river teaches, the land remembers, and every person is welcomed into relationship with this place.

Learn Bobbi Rose's Story

Dinjii Zhuh Adventures

Owner & Lead Guide — Where culture meets the current ↗

The Work

Every river, every workshop, every beaded piece carries the same intention.

River Guiding

Multi-day river expeditions through Yukon and NWT. Gwich'in-led, land-based, culturally grounded.

Explore →

Youth & Community

Mentorship programs, youth river guide training, and community-based trips that pass knowledge forward.

Explore →

Art & Fashion

Beadwork, collaborative fashion, and creative projects rooted in Gwich'in aesthetics and northern land.

Explore →

Media & Research

Features, interviews, film, and academic work that amplifies Indigenous voices and land-based perspectives.

Explore →

“The river doesn't ask if you're ready. It just takes you where you need to go.”

— Bobbi Rose

Research

Frontiers in Sustainable Tourism

Indigenous Land-Based Guiding

Academic research on Indigenous land-based guiding, cultural continuity, and sustainable tourism.

Read Research ↗

Collaborations

Wear the Story

Curated pieces that carry the land forward — from beadwork to apparel, each collaboration is a conversation between culture and craft.

River Beautyyy × Yukon Apparel

Apparel collaboration — Gwich'in-influenced design in wearable form.

Shop the Collection ↗

Dinjii Zhuh Store

Cultural goods and apparel — supporting guiding work and community programming directly.

Visit the Store ↗

Life on the Land

Let's Begin Something

Whether you're interested in a river journey, a speaking engagement, a collaboration, or a mentorship conversation — reach out. This work grows through relationship.

Start a Conversation

Bobbi Rose

Teetl'it Gwich'in. Culture. Land. Rivers.

River guide, mentor, artist, and land protector based in Whitehorse, Yukon. Owner of Dinjii Zhuh Adventures. Carrying Gwich'in knowledge forward through every river journey and story shared.

hello@bobbirose.ca
